items.title: Retailers Are Issuing Console Shortage Warnings Ahead of GTA 6, and Now I'm Worried Scalpers Are Going to Have a Field Day This Christmas
items.summary: A major retailer has warned there will be console shortages ahead of the launch of GTA 6 in November, sparking concern that scalpers will cash in on demand for PS5 and Xbox Series X and S this Christmas.

items.title: What Can We Expect from GTA 6 Online, and When Will We Play It?

items.title: IGN Poll Reveals 70% Plan to Buy the GTA 6 Ultimate Edition Over the Standard Edition
items.summary: Earlier this week, IGN ran a poll asking you which edition of GTA 6 you planned to buy: the $80 Standard Edition, or the $100 Ultimate Edition. Well, after thousands of respondents, the results are in — and they might come as a surprise to some.

items.title: GTA 6 takes aim at TikTok with a new social network where we'll apparently be able to follow influencers, get side missions, and maybe get famous?

items.title: Grand Theft Auto 6 demand may be so high it will "likely outstrip supply" this holiday season, a video game retailer warns

items.title: Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc in the box, Insomniac assures players as GTA 6's download code approach sends ripples around the industry
items.summary: Insomniac Games has assured fans not to worry: unlike the impending GTA 6 , the physical edition of Marvel's Wolverine will come with a disc when it releases exclusively on PlayStation 5 on 15th September. Read more

items.title: Unlike GTA 6, Marvel’s Wolverine Will Ship With A Disc
items.summary: While everyone is debating the disc-lessness of Grand Theft Auto 6 , developer Insomniac Games has confirmed that it won't follow suit with its upcoming superhero sim, Marvel's Wolverine .
